content.en:
"I'll go first, Wansheng, you drag him down!"

Mi Liyu Ancestral Dao.

He didn't want to waste time, once he lost time, what if there was an invincible domain ancestor hidden in the mountain realm?

It wasn't very likely, but he didn't want anything wrong.

Therefore, he left here with the saint-grade vein first, and instead the Qingyuan Holy Land, which was the safest way.

As for the Immortal Domain Ancestor, he is an invincible Domain Ancestor himself, and he can easily leave.

"Good!"

The Ancestor of the Ten Thousand Lives Domain nodded.

The Saint-level veins are the most important, and they really can't afford to waste time here.

After all, on the premise of not killing Ye Tian, it will take a little time to severely damage Ye Tian, so that Ye Tian will not be able to pursue them.

Therefore, it was up to him to stop Ye Tian, this was the best plan.

Wow!

The Mi Li Domain Ancestor was about to shuttle away with the Qingyuan Realm Beads, leaving through the world entrances of the Xuanxu Saint Realm, or tearing apart the world barriers and leaving when the Ten Thousand Life Domain Ancestor was involved with Ye Tian.

Although they were stopped by the power of the world just now, if they attacked again and again, they could still break the world barrier and leave the Xuanxu Holy Realm.

Therefore, Mili Yuzu is not worried that he will not be able to leave.

It's a pity that they still underestimated Ye Tian.

"Just the two of you, you want to go?"

Ye Tian urged the power of the Xuanxu Saint Realm with all his strength to bless his body, and at this moment, his strength reached an incomparably terrifying increase level.

Through the Time Fragment Divine Technique, he spied into the corner of the future, knowing that the strength of these two invincible domain ancestors was not very terrifying, and they could not threaten him, so he dared to intercept them like this, otherwise he would not have rushed up so recklessly.

"Five Elements Ban!"

Ye Tian instantly blocked the void and stopped the Mili Domain Ancestor.

If the Mili Domain Ancestor wanted to break through the blockade of the Five Elements Prohibition and escape, it was almost difficult.

After all, he wouldn't give them time to break the ban of the Five Elements, and with the effect of the Creation Mixed Yuan Well, Ye Tian was able to mobilize all the power of the Xuanxu Saint Realm, and it would be even more difficult for them to leave.

"Hit him hard!"

Seeing that he couldn't leave for the time being, the ancestor of the Mili Domain said coldly.

Rumble!!!!

The two Invincible Domain Ancestors made a move, and they used the same holy technique, the Qingfeng Giant Hand!

As the invincible domain ancestor of the Qingyuan Holy Land, there are only a few holy skills they can obtain, because the holy skills of the Qingyuan Holy Land are very few.

Only the top Holy Lands and the Ten Great Holy Gates possessed a lot of holy skills, and it was quite good for an invincible domain ancestor like them to be able to obtain a holy skill.

The two Qingfeng giant hands that covered a void grabbed Ye Tian, and the strength of such an attack was enough to easily catch any Supreme Domain Ancestor.

If Ye Tian didn't have the power increase of the Xuanxu Saint Realm, it would be difficult to compete with these two Invincible Domain Ancestors with his own strength, after all, these two Invincible Domain Ancestors were not weak, although they were not as good as the Blood Gang Domain Ancestors, but they could definitely support a few moves under the attack of the Blood Gang Domain Ancestors.

Ye Tian was sure to kill the ordinary Invincible Domain Ancestors, but he couldn't compete with these two Invincible Domain Ancestors.

But now with the increase in the Xuanxu Saint Realm, his combat power has soared many times, and he is naturally not afraid of these two invincible domain ancestors.

He could even consume these two Invincible Domain Ancestors.

"Golden Body Holy Technique!"

"Holy Armor Holy Technique!"

"Imperial Body Technique!"

......

Ye Tian performed a holy skill and fought against the Mili Domain Ancestor and the Ten Thousand Life Domain Ancestor.

Ye Tian was holding a sword-type holy relic, which was a holy relic born before the Xuanxu Holy Realm, and now it had become his saber.

I saw him slash away with one sword, and with the Void Slash Holy Technique, he slashed out a terrifying blow.

Burst!!!!

Mi Li Domain Ancestor was slashed away with a single sword, leaving a knife mark on his body that almost penetrated his body.

The knife hurt him!

"How is it possible, he is only the strongest domain ancestor, how can he hurt me with a knife?"

Mi Li Yu Ancestor couldn't believe it.

It's not that he hasn't encountered geniuses, even if many geniuses are promoted to Invincible Domain Ancestors, he can suppress them with one hand.

After all, he was a five-step invincible domain ancestor!

The Invincible Domain Ancestor was just a realm, and there was no specific division at first, but as countless Invincible Domain Ancestors could not be promoted to the Invincible Domain Ancestor, the Dark Sacred Domain began to divide the Invincible Domain Ancestor into grades.

For example, the closest to the Superior Domain Ancestor, it can be said that it is only one step away from being promoted to the Invincible Domain Ancestor, this kind of Invincible Domain Ancestor is extremely terrifying in combat power, it can be called a one-step invincible Domain Ancestor, and the combat effectiveness is slightly weaker, it is called a two-step invincible Domain Ancestor, and finally a nine-step Invincible Domain Ancestor.

Under normal circumstances, those who can be promoted to Invincible Domain Ancestors are all geniuses, and their combat power is very strong, and those Invincible Domain Ancestors who reluctantly use some special treasures to advance to the extreme, after cultivating to the extreme of Invincible Domain Ancestors, are about nine steps Invincible Domain Ancestors.

And some of the newly promoted Invincible Domain Ancestors, if their combat effectiveness is not as good as the Nine-Step Invincible Domain Ancestor, they can only be called ordinary Invincible Domain Ancestors.

And as a five-step invincible domain ancestor, he is also very powerful, and he will even be injured by a supreme domain ancestor.

This shows that even if Ye Tian's strength does not reach the combat power of the four-step invincible domain ancestor, it has definitely reached the combat power of the five-step invincible domain ancestor.

Of course, they could also see that Ye Tian had relied on the power of the Xuanxu Saint Realm, but his own combat power was definitely not weak.

"Eternal Holy Technique!"

Time was frozen, and Ye Tian slashed at the Wansheng Domain Ancestor with the fastest speed, directly slashing the head of the Wansheng Domain Ancestor.

However, in an instant, the Ancestor of the Ten Thousand Lives Domain recovered his head.

The Mili Domain Ancestor and the Wansheng Domain Ancestor couldn't hurt Ye Tian at all, and any blow from Ye Tian could hurt both of them.

But the Invincible Domain Ancestor is the Invincible Domain Ancestor, with an invincible domain body, and the physical body can be called immortal and immortal, even if Ye Tian's strength is very strong, it is difficult to wipe out their physical body and soul.

As time passed, the injuries of the Separation Domain Ancestor and the Ten Thousand Life Domain Ancestor became more and more serious.

Fight! Fight!

Ye Tian fought frantically, showing almost all of his strength, like a terrifying supreme god and demon, making the Mili Domain Ancestor and the Ten Thousand Life Domain Ancestor fearful.

And this battle also attracted a lot of domain ancestors, one by one domain ancestors came to this area and saw this big battle.

Suddenly, they were shocked by Ye Tian's combat power.

"The strength of the Ten Thousand Laws Domain Ancestor has actually reached such a level!!!

The Blue Fish Domain Ancestor was shocked.

Although Ye Tian used the power of the Xuanxu Saint Realm, with Ye Tian's own strength alone, I am afraid that he would be able to defeat her easily.

The light-clothed saintess was also shocked, when was she still able to fight Ye Tian, but now the gap between the two sides is too big.

Although she has also been promoted to the Supreme Domain Ancestor now, compared to Ye Tian, it is simply not a grade.
